description_long: This is a modern bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a lush, landscaped garden and a paved driveway leading to a garage. The main building features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and gray exterior finishes, giving it a contemporary appearance. The front yard is bordered by hedges and includes a pathway, while the backyard is spacious with scattered trees, a small gazebo, and open green space. Two cars are parked on the adjacent street, and the property is surrounded by a low fence. The bungalow appears to have a single story with a prominent entrance and several outdoor seating areas. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, set on a rectangular lot with a driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with hedges and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, backyard greenery, and the garage's position relative to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious backyard, gazebo, and the arrangement of trees and open lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side facade, additional garden space, and the street with parked cars.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and sides
